name: Buffalo Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Chill celery and Blue Cheese dressing if preparing with wings.
2. Preheat oven broiler or BBQ.
3. Trim off wing tips.
4. Separate wings into 2 sections.
5. Slowly melt butter in a large saucepan.
6. Add hot sauce, vinegar (if using), and remove from heat.
7. Brush oil on both sides of wings with vegetable oil.
8. Place wings on broiling rack.
9. Broil for 15-20 minutes, tossing wings and sauce together.
Cook Time: Approximately 20 minutes
Fat grams per serving: Less fattening than the traditional deep fried version
